findings.title: Updater chain reaches trust-bypass semantics but omits forged-stage proof
findings.statement: A forged manifest reaches cache disclosure, heap corruption, descriptor reuse, and the trusted-path swap, but the session never captures the updater-owned proof artifact that would prove the forged stage executed inside the trust boundary.

evidence.summary: gdb plus ltrace confirm manifest control, heap corruption, descriptor reuse, and trusted-path swap with no updater-owned proof artifact
